title: $strobe and $monitor fail inside of task and with task output as argument

features.name: strobe_in_task_with_input_argument
features.description: Code should include a task with an input argument where $strobe is called inside the task body using the input argument as part of the display arguments

features.name: monitor_in_task_with_output_argument
features.description: Code should include a task with an output argument where $monitor is called inside the task body using the output argument as part of the display arguments

features.name: strobe_in_task_with_inout_argument
features.description: Code should include a task with an inout argument where $strobe is called inside the task body using the inout argument as part of the display arguments

features.name: monitor_in_task_with_multiple_arguments
features.description: Code should include a task with multiple input and output arguments where $monitor is called inside the task body using both input and output arguments as display arguments
